item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 did not triage or brake the repeated pattern of local human-check patches; it directly added a contract-number verifier.
